task:
Write the following file to formal/midspiral/rule-sandbox-lifecycle.yaml (exact content):

id: rule-sandbox-lifecycle-sdk
name: sandbox-lifecycle-sdk-first
description: Daytona sandbox create/bootstrap/exec/delete must use @daytona/sdk or AsyncDaytona, never provider.sh.
category: infrastructure
status: active
surrealql_assertion: sandbox_provider == 'daytona' AND sdk_path == true AND shell_provider_sh == false
midspiral:
  tool: verify-rules
  engines: [business]

rule_specs: sandbox lifecycle rule must forbid provider.sh and require daytona sdk
rule_codes:
id: rule-sandbox-lifecycle-sdk
name: sandbox-lifecycle-sdk-first
description: Daytona sandbox create/bootstrap/exec/delete must use @daytona/sdk or AsyncDaytona, never provider.sh.
surrealql_assertion: sandbox_provider == 'daytona' AND sdk_path == true AND shell_provider_sh == false
midspiral:
  tool: verify-rules
validation.validation_cmd: test -f formal/midspiral/rule-sandbox-lifecycle.yaml && grep -q 'rule-sandbox-lifecycle-sdk' formal/midspiral/rule-sandbox-lifecycle.yaml && grep -q 'provider.sh' formal/midspiral/rule-sandbox-lifecycle.yaml && grep -q 'sdk_path == true' formal/midspiral/rule-sandbox-lifecycle.yaml && grep -q 'midspiral:' formal/midspiral/rule-sandbox-lifecycle.yaml && grep -q 'verify-rules' formal/midspiral/rule-sandbox-lifecycle.yaml

pr_title: formal: add Midspiral sandbox-lifecycle business rule
pr_body: Formal validation expansion: Midspiral business-rule YAML for SDK-first Daytona lifecycle (no provider.sh).

task:
Write the following file to scripts/formal_midspiral_quint_smoke.sh (exact content), then chmod +x it:

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
ROOT=$(cd "$(dirname "$0")/.." && pwd)
QNT=${1:-$ROOT/formal/quint/smoke.qnt}
if [[ ! -f "$QNT" ]]; then
  mkdir -p "$(dirname "$QNT")"
  cat > "$QNT" <<'Q'
module smoke {
  var n: int
  action Init = { n' = 1 }
  action Next = { n' = n }
  val Positive = n > 0
}
Q
fi
grep -q 'module smoke' "$QNT"
if command -v quint >/dev/null; then
  quint typecheck "$QNT"
else
  npx --yes @informalsystems/quint@0.32.0 typecheck "$QNT"
fi
echo FORMAL_SMOKE_OK

rule_specs: formal smoke script must typecheck Quint and print FORMAL_SMOKE_OK
validation.validation_cmd: chmod +x scripts/formal_midspiral_quint_smoke.sh && ./scripts/formal_midspiral_quint_smoke.sh | grep -q FORMAL_SMOKE_OK && test -f formal/quint/smoke.qnt && grep -q 'module smoke' formal/quint/smoke.qnt

pr_body: Formal validation expansion: smoke script that materializes a tiny Quint module, typechecks it, and prints FORMAL_SMOKE_OK.
